commands.review_summary:
The PR moves `runMemoryFlushIfNeeded` before `runPreflightCompactionIfNeeded` in `runReplyAgent` and adds runtime-config coverage for that ordering.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence runtime reproduction was run for this PR. Source inspection gives a clear current-main path: `runReplyAgent` compacts first, updates post-compaction token state, then the flush gate can see reduced token pressure.
commands.review_followup: Not a repair-lane candidate: the reviewed diff has no narrow code defect; the remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer real behavior proof.

target.title: Run memory flush before preflight compaction
target.body:
Fixes #84695.

## Summary

- run automatic memory flush before preflight compaction in `runReplyAgent`
- keep visible memory-flush errors on the same pre-run return path before the main reply
- add regression coverage proving memory flush is invoked before preflight compaction

## Real behavior proof

- the regression test now asserts `runMemoryFlushIfNeeded` is called before `runPreflightCompactionIfNeeded`
- this preserves the high pre-compaction token/session state for the flush gate, so the daily-memory summary turn can run before compaction lowers cached tokens or advances the compaction cycle

## Validation

- `/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-direct-runtime-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-memory.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/reply-state.test.ts`
- `/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node /Users/andy/openclaw/node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json --pretty false --declaration false --singleThreaded --checkers 1`
- `/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node /Users/andy/openclaw/node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-direct-runtime-config.test.ts`

If this PR is squash-merged or reworked, please preserve author attribution or include:

`Co-authored-by: Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com>`
target.author: turbotheturtle
